item-firearrow-flavortext: Because of its weight and lack of sharpness, it might not be very useful for combat. However, its fire is very bright, so it can bring light to the dark.
item-firearrow-instructions:
Must be lit to provide light. Hold a lit torch in your left hand, then hold the arrow in your right hand, then hold right click.
Can also be lit the same way torches can.
